def process_items(data_source):
    items = (transform(x) for x in data_source.fetch())
    first_pass = list(items)
    total = sum(first_pass)
    second_pass = list(items)
    average = sum(second_pass) / len(second_pass)
    return total, average

def find_matches(records):
    candidates = (r for r in records if r["score"] > 50)
    count = sum(1 for _ in candidates)
    top = list(candidates)[:10]
    return count, top

def aggregate_metrics(logs):
    entries = (parse_line(line) for line in logs)
    valid = [e for e in entries if e is not None]
    total_count = sum(1 for _ in entries)
    return valid, total_count
